Console and log functions, build configuration, GPIO control, and JavaScript task initialization for ESP8266.


## Files
- **[jerry_port.c](jerry_port.c.md)**: Implements console and log message functions, process termination, and basic I/O operations for ESP8266.
- **[Makefile](Makefile.md)**: Makefile for configuring build options and managing dependencies for the ESP8266 target in the JerryScript project.
- **[native_esp8266.c](native_esp8266.c.md)**: Functions for configuring and controlling GPIO on the ESP8266 platform.
- **[user_gpio.c](user_gpio.c.md)**: Functions for configuring GPIO output and reading GPIO input on the ESP8266.
- **[user_main.c](user_main.c.md)**: Entry point for user application on ESP8266, initializing and running JavaScript tasks.
